text:
/ci1 2 ハッハハハ！　待ち焦がれたぜ！
この手で、テメェをぶっ潰せる
この瞬間をよォ！

/ci1 2 今こそ皆の無念を晴らします！
守護輝士。
どうかお力添えを！

/ci1 2 Haaah ha ha! I've been waiting for this!
This is the moment I get to crush you
bastards with my very own hands!

/ci1 2 Now is the time to settle the score! Guardians,
lend us your strength!
